items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to confirm the expected outcome of the persona scenario validation.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario behavior regarding 'Deposit collection vs full payment', but the evidence does not provide sufficient details or results from this specific simulation. While prior steps indicate successful operations in related areas, they do not directly address the expected results of this particular scenario. Therefore, the lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive verdict regarding the validation of the persona scenario.
